ntxp-contracts.description: Poll and update the NTXP Master Contracts database: search contracts, fetch a full profile (terms + owner-entity contact info + jobs/sales roll-up), look up reference fields (coefficient, cooperative fee, expiration, allowable scope, signed-PDF link), list expiring contracts, upsert, and cache JobTread jobs. The single source of truth for contract reference data across NTXP tools.
